message:
test(guard): add 18 tests for paths_conflict, parse_name_status_z, fnmatch, is_expired

Coverage expansion for mcp-agent-mail-guard crate (75 → 93 tests):
- paths_conflict: 6 boundary tests (prefix length, sibling non-match, double-star depth, empty strings, symmetric directory, substring safety)
- parse_name_status_z: 5 edge cases (incomplete rename, unknown status, trailing nuls, copy entry, all status types)
- fnmatch: 3 tests (star directory boundary, empty pattern, star at beginning)
- contains_glob: 1 test (detects all glob chars)
- is_expired: 3 tests (far future, far past, empty string)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
